## 🚀 Description
<!-- Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue/feature. -->

Fixes # (issue number)

## 🛠️ Type of Change
<!-- Check all boxes that apply: -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue in Airflow or dbt)
- [ ] 🌟 New feature (non-breaking change which adds a data mart or Power BI visual)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing table schemas to change)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation update

## ✅ Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the data engineering conventions of this project
- [ ] I have verified that `dbt test` passes successfully on my modified models
- [ ] I have updated the data dictionary if adding new columns
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own SQL / Python code
